name: Get listed on Hotels.com
description: Learn how to claim and create your Hotels.com listing with this quick and simple tutorial.
richtext:
Step 1: Find your business

Visit Hotels’ homepage and click on “Add Hotel” under “For Suppliers, Affiliates and the Media” at the footer of the page. You will be redirected to the Expedia Lodging Partner Services Page. Click on “Join Us” under interested in working with Expedia.

Step 2: Provide Information about your Business

In the “Contact Us” page, you will have to enter some information about your business like property name, address and contact information. You will have to make sure that you mention the correct contact information as Hotels.com will contact you on this mail ID or phone number.Once you submit this form, a representative from Hotels.com will contact you to help you with lisiting you business on Hotels.com website.

Step 3: Claim your Business (if it is already listed on Hotels.com) Get To The Form

If you wish to claim your business that is already listed on Hotels.com, you will have to get in touch with Hotels.com through mail or phone.
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
